jsonLd.title: Xpressbees is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Xpressbees invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
